arts.ttl: Ian Wright fumes at 'disrespectful' transfer theory involving Arsenal target Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Ian Wright has said it is not fair to hype up a potential summer move for Alexander Isak this summer because Newcastle has become a destination for players thanks to Eddie Howe

arts.ttl: Newcastle United training ground plans revealed as new site update emerges
arts.sum: A Newcastle statement read: "We have submitted plans to extend the club’s current first team Training Centre as work to identify a new site for a future training facility continues. "The redevelopment proposals look to build upon the significant work carried out at the Darsley Park site in recent years, which has helped to deliver elite performance facilities for first team players and staff.

arts.ttl: The Key Quotes from Oliver Glasner’s pre-Newcastle press conference
arts.sum: With a quick turnaround from Saturday’s defeat to the reigning champions Manchester City, Oliver Glasner previewed the second of four games in 10 days against Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Going to the game?: Newcastle v Crystal Palace matchday guide
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are on the road against on Wednesday (16th April, 19:30 BST), taking on Newcastle United at St. James' Park.

arts.ttl: ‘No one has contacted the club’ – Bemusement as player set to join Newcastle United, ‘deplorable’ performance
arts.sum: Malaga have been left somewhat bemused by reports that Antoñito Cordero is set to join Newcastle United, with the Spanish club yet to be contacted over it. That’s according to AS, who say the news has been ‘set up as a bomb’ in Malaga, particularly as they currently find themselves in a ‘serious results crisis’. The post ‘No one has contacted the club’ – Bemusement as player set to join Newcastle United, ‘deplorable’ performance appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid miss out: Spanish prodigy opts for move to Newcastle
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two leading clubs have this week been dealt something of a blow on the transfer front. This comes amid confirmation that Málaga talent Antonio Cordero has made the call…

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace confirm length of Will Hughes contract extension as Oliver Glasner, Steve Parish heap praise on "important" midfielder
arts.sum: Crystal Palace announce that 'true fans favourite' Will Hughes has extended his contract at the club.

arts.ttl: Antonio Cordero cheat sheet: 14 things to know about Newcastle United's exciting new signing
arts.sum: Cordero is just 18 years of old but already has a lengthy CV of different clubs in Spain, as well as regular appearances in Malaga's first-team - despite his relative inexperience. In September 2023, before he had even appeared in the club's reserve side, Cordero made his first team debut as a late substitute for in a home win over Atletico Madrid B; aged just 16 years, nine months and 17 days.
